title: Twitter/X Profile Scraper — Extract Tweets & Analytics
description: Scrape public Twitter/X profiles and tweets with full analytics data. Extract profile information, follower counts, tweet content, engagement metrics, and media URLs. Supports batch processing of multiple accounts.

usernames.title: Twitter/X Usernames or Profile URLs
usernames.description: List of Twitter/X usernames (e.g. 'elonmusk') or full profile URLs (e.g. 'https://x.com/elonmusk'). One per line.

maxTweetsPerProfile.title: Max Tweets Per Profile
maxTweetsPerProfile.description: Maximum number of tweets to scrape per profile. Higher values take longer.

includeReplies.title: Include Replies
includeReplies.description: Include reply tweets in the results. Replies are tweets posted in response to other tweets.

includeRetweets.title: Include Retweets
includeRetweets.description: Include retweets in the results. Retweets are shares of other users' tweets.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for scraping. Residential proxies are strongly recommended for Twitter/X scraping to avoid rate limits.
